title: malva preissiana
intro: Malva preissiana, also known as prickly mallow, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae and is native to Western Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Malva preissiana include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications for skin irritations and other skin conditions.
